ideation: This sequence simulates kicking a soccer ball. The right leg will be used to kick the ball, while the left arm will balance the robot. The animation will start with both arms at rest, then the right arm will move back to build momentum, and then it will swing forward to kick the ball. Finally, both arms will return to rest. Frame 1 shows both arms at rest. Frame 2 shows the right arm moving back. Frame 3 shows the right arm swinging forward, kicking the ball. Frame 4 shows both arms returning to rest.

frames.beat: both arms rest, ready for action
the right arm pulls back, gathering power
the right arm swings forward in a mighty kick
both arms return to a relaxed, post-kick pose
